reviews.comment:

Being from here, it's a very small place with few fuel pumps and very slow service.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT205amFGZHFkbEZNVFRWRlVHTkdXVVZhY1Y5VFRuYxAB

reviews.comment:
Baños limpios con agua jabón y papel. Sandwiches tostados (crudo y queso) muy ricos. Atención de playa, armarse de paciencia a la siesta. Justo cambio de turno....20 minutos esperando y había un solo playero atendiendo de a 1 por vez.

(Translated by Google)
Clean restrooms with soap and toilet paper. Delicious toasted sandwiches (ham and cheese). Beach service, be prepared for siesta time. Right at the shift change... 20-minute wait and there was only one attendant serving one person at a time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25ST1lXcE5SbWRqUlRoTGNUbEhZbEEzZDBGcVZWRRAB

reviews.comment:
45 minutos para cargar combustible,  tenía solo 4 autos adelante, una verguenza. Un desastre la paja calamitosa que tienen. Esperé porque no tenía más combustible y no hay otra estación. Deplorables.
Luego de 40 minutos más, reformulo esta reseña, ademas de la demora para cargar combustible,  demoraron 40 minutos para preparar 4 hamburguesas con jamón y queso, estábamos solo nosotros 4 en el servicompras. Cada minuto que estamos acá empeora

(Translated by Google)
45 minutes to fill up, there were only 4 cars ahead of me, a disgrace. The service is a complete disaster. I waited because I was out of fuel and there's no other station nearby. Deplorable.

After another 40 minutes, I'm revising this review. In addition to the long wait for fuel, it took them 40 minutes to prepare 4 ham and cheese burgers. There were only 4 of us in the convenience store. Every minute we're here gets worse.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21ZMVIxRktkVFJKZUdwQmFqZzFiMFZ6ZGxwRFltYxAB

reviews.comment:
El ACA siempre está donde los demás brillan por su ausencia

(Translated by Google)
The ACA is always there where others are conspicuous by their absence.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25wVFdtcHRjRWR4UVVwelJtaFRZakZhWVhSelVWRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente los playeros, mal el ACA, roto el compresor para calibrar las cubiertas, y en domingo todas las gomerias cerradas. Aspecto a tener en cuenta

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were excellent, but the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) was terrible; the tire pressure monitoring system was broken, and all the tire shops were closed on Sundays. Something to keep in mind.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2w5YWVVWTVVekZ4ZDBGWGFGVnlURTF1ZVRWcVowRRAB

reviews.comment:
Vine a cargar llovía me dijeron que por eso no se podía me mandaron a otro lugar. Tengo dinero en la aplicación entonces di un par de vueltas y estaban cargando normal. Cargue quise pasar al baño y me dijeron que no funcionan. Desde Chilecito vengo manejando y aquí no me dejaron pasar al baño. Estoy de paso. Pero la atención. Es pésima.

(Translated by Google)
I came to charge my phone, but it was raining. They told me that's why they couldn't charge me and sent me somewhere else. I have money on the app, so I drove around a couple of times and they were charging normally. I charged my phone, wanted to use the restroom, and they told me they weren't working. I've been driving all the way from Chilecito, and they wouldn't even let me use the restroom here. I'm just passing through. But the service is terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21aV2NXUktkaTEyYzFCVWJGOUtWVFZOUkdkSGVuYxAB
